issues.title: Damage spike on floor 3 encounter 2
issues.description: Enemy dealt 20 damage when player had 22 HP (90.9% of current HP). This exceeds the 50% threshold.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 200, profile scholar-expert

issues.title: Difficulty spike on floor 2 encounter 2
issues.description: Encounter against stone_sentinel took 8 turns to resolve, more than 2x the previous floor's average of 3.7 turns. This indicates a sudden difficulty increase.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 200, profile scholar-expert

issues.title: Card type "wild" never played
issues.description: The "wild" card type was never used during this playthrough. This may indicate the card type is unavailable, underpowered, or the player's deck/archetype doesn't include it.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 200, profile scholar-expert
Monitor card type distribution during run
Check if "wild" cards appear in deck
